instructions.name: add_liquidity
docs: Add liquidity to the pool by depositing collateral.

instructions.name: buy_outcome_tokens
docs: Buy outcome tokens: deposit collateral, receive equal YES + NO.

instructions.name: claim_committer
docs: Claim your share (YES/NO/LP tokens at fair odds) after the vault launched.

instructions.name: commit_no
docs: Commit USDG to the NO side of the vault.

instructions.name: commit_yes
docs: Commit USDG to the YES side of the vault.

instructions.name: create_market
docs: Create a new prediction market with YES/NO outcome tokens.
Market ID is auto-incremented from the registry.

accounts.name: collateral_mint
docs: The collateral token mint (e.g. USDG) — supports both SPL Token and Token-2022

instructions.name: initialize_pool
docs: Initialize an AMM pool for a market with initial collateral.

accounts.name: yes_reserve
docs: YES token reserve (owned by pool PDA, SPL Token)

accounts.name: no_reserve
docs: NO token reserve (owned by pool PDA, SPL Token)

accounts.name: collateral_reserve
docs: Collateral reserve (pre-created Token-2022 account, owned by pool PDA)

accounts.name: payer_collateral
docs: Payer's collateral token account (Token-2022 compatible)

accounts.name: payer_lp
docs: Payer's LP token account (created via ATA)

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program (for YES/NO/LP tokens)

accounts.name: collateral_token_program
docs: Token program for collateral (could be Token-2022)

instructions.name: initialize_registry
docs: Initialize the global registry (one-time setup).
`initial_count` skips past markets created before the registry existed.

instructions.name: initialize_vault
docs: Create a vault that collects YES/NO commitments for a configurable duration,
then auto-launches a pm-AMM market at fair odds.

accounts.name: collateral_vault
docs: Token account holding all committed USDG until launch/refund.
Pre-created by the client (needs Token-2022 extensions sizing)

instructions.name: launch_vault_market
docs: Launch the market from a completed vault (anyone can call after 24h if launchable).

accounts.name: collateral_reserve
docs: Pool collateral reserve — pre-created by caller (needs Token-2022 extensions)

accounts.name: vault_lp
docs: Vault's LP token account — receives LP tokens at launch (held for committer claims)

accounts.name: vault_yes
docs: Vault's YES token account — for fair-odds distribution to YES committers

accounts.name: vault_no
docs: Vault's NO token account

instructions.name: redeem
docs: Redeem winning tokens for collateral after market resolution.

accounts.name: yes_reserve
docs: Pool's YES reserve (read-only — used to compute circulating supply)

accounts.name: no_reserve
docs: Pool's NO reserve (read-only)

accounts.name: user_yes
docs: User's YES token account

accounts.name: user_no
docs: User's NO token account

accounts.name: user_collateral
docs: User's collateral token account

instructions.name: refund_commit
docs: Refund your USDG if the vault expired without launching.

instructions.name: remove_liquidity
docs: Remove liquidity by burning LP tokens.

instructions.name: resolve_market
docs: Resolve the market with the winning outcome.

instructions.name: sell_outcome_tokens
docs: Sell outcome tokens: burn X YES + X NO, receive X USDG (minus fee).

instructions.name: set_registry_count
docs: Set registry count (admin only, for fixing existing state).

instructions.name: swap
docs: Swap YES tokens for NO tokens or vice versa.

accounts.name: yes_reserve
docs: Pool's YES token reserve

accounts.name: no_reserve
docs: Pool's NO token reserve

accounts.name: user_yes
docs: User's YES token account

accounts.name: user_no
docs: User's NO token account

accounts.name: collateral_reserve
docs: Pool's collateral (USDG) reserve — read-only, needed for solvency check.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller is not the market authority

errors.name: VaultCommitPhaseActive
errors.msg: Vault commit phase is still active

errors.name: VaultNotLaunchable
errors.msg: Vault cannot be launched (no commitments on one side or below minimum)

errors.name: VaultNotRefundable
errors.msg: Vault is not in refundable state

errors.name: LpLockedUntilResolution
errors.msg: LP tokens locked until market resolution

types.name: CommitterPosition
docs: Per-user commitment record. One per (vault, user) pair.

fields.name: yes_amount
docs: USDG amount committed to YES side

fields.name: no_amount
docs: USDG amount committed to NO side

fields.name: claimed
docs: Whether the user has claimed their outcome tokens post-launch

fields.name: refunded
docs: Whether the user has refunded their commitment (if vault didn't launch)

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority that can resolve this market

fields.name: yes_mint
docs: Mint for the YES outcome token

fields.name: no_mint
docs: Mint for the NO outcome token

fields.name: collateral_mint
docs: Collateral token mint (e.g. USDC)

fields.name: resolution_time
docs: Unix timestamp when the market can be resolved

fields.name: resolved
docs: Whether the market has been resolved

fields.name: winning_outcome
docs: The winning outcome: true = YES wins, false = NO wins

fields.name: outcome_set
docs: Whether winning_outcome has been set

fields.name: market_id
docs: Unique identifier / nonce for this market

fields.name: title
docs: Market title / question (max 128 bytes)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump

fields.name: market
docs: The market this pool belongs to

fields.name: yes_reserve
docs: Token account holding YES tokens in the pool

fields.name: no_reserve
docs: Token account holding NO tokens in the pool

fields.name: collateral_reserve
docs: Token account holding collateral in the pool

fields.name: lp_mint
docs: LP token mint

fields.name: liquidity_param
docs: Current liquidity parameter L (scaled by SCALE)

fields.name: initial_liquidity
docs: Initial liquidity L₀ for dynamic variant (scaled by SCALE)

fields.name: creation_time
docs: Market creation timestamp (for dynamic variant time calculation)

fields.name: maturity_time
docs: Market maturity timestamp T

fields.name: is_dynamic
docs: Whether this pool uses the dynamic variant (L_t = L₀√(T−t))

fields.name: total_collateral
docs: Total collateral deposited

fields.name: fee_bps
docs: Fee in basis points (0-1000)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority that initialized the registry

fields.name: market_count
docs: Number of markets created (auto-incremented)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump

types.name: Vault
docs: Commitment Vault — collects YES/NO commitments for 24h,
then auto-launches a pm-AMM market at price = yes_total / (yes_total + no_total).

fields.name: authority
docs: Creator of the vault — becomes the market authority at launch

fields.name: collateral_mint
docs: Collateral token mint (e.g. USDG)

fields.name: collateral_vault
docs: Token account holding committed USDG (owned by vault PDA)

fields.name: commit_end_time
docs: When commitment phase ends (unix timestamp)

fields.name: resolution_time
docs: When the market will expire and be resolvable (unix timestamp)

fields.name: yes_total
docs: Total USDG committed to YES

fields.name: no_total
docs: Total USDG committed to NO

fields.name: launched
docs: Whether launch_market() has been called successfully

fields.name: vault_id
docs: Vault's unique id (used as seed)

fields.name: title
docs: Market title / question

fields.name: total_yes_tokens_owed
docs: Total outcome tokens owed to committers (computed at launch, paid via claim)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump
